title: Localize a website with HTMLRewriter
excerpt: title: Localize a website with HTMLRewriter description: This tutorial uses the HTMLRewriter functionality in the Cloudflare Workers platform to overlay an i18n layer, automatically translating the site based on the user's language. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this tutorial, you will build an example internationalization and localization engine (commonly referred to as **i18n** and **l10n**) for your application, serve the content of your site, and automatically translate the content based on your visitors’ location in the world.
